description.value: > Defense Associated Domain: Protection. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the resistant touch power of the Protection domain. Deflection Aura (Su): Once each day, you can emit a 20- foot aura for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level. Allies within the aura gain a +2 deflection bonus to AC and combat maneuver defense. Replacement Domain Spells: 1stâ shield, 2ndâ barkskin, 7thâ deflection.
